title: ok minimal fixture
problem: Minimal well-formed plan used by run-plan-validator-cases.sh to assert exit 0. Description fields are padded with realistic copy so the >=200 char rule is satisfied. Acceptance criteria are also padded.
acceptance_criteria: Every sub-task lands as an independent PR with verifiable evidence in the PR body and CI gate passes.

tasks.title: alpha
tasks.description: Alpha sub-task description padded to satisfy the new >=200 char rule. The contents are intentionally verbose so the validator does not flag this fixture as short. Tests the OK exit code path of the plan validator end-to-end.

tasks.title: beta
tasks.description: Beta sub-task description padded to satisfy the >=200 char rule. The fixture is used by the validator test runner and must not produce any warning or error so the expected exit code can remain a clean zero across reruns.
